description_long: This is a rectangular white envelope, commonly used for mailing letters or documents. The front side features two red postage stamps in the upper right corner and several lines of handwritten text, simulating an address and sender information. The envelope is made of thin, smooth paper, and its edges are sharply defined, giving it a crisp appearance. There are no visible openings, flaps, or windows on the exterior, suggesting a standard sealed design. The back side is plain, with no markings or features. The overall look is clean and utilitarian, suitable for everyday postal use.
description: A white rectangular envelope with two red stamps and handwritten address lines on the front, made of smooth paper.
description_view_0: A thin side profile of the envelope, showing its narrow edge and flatness.
description_view_1: A plain, unmarked back view of the envelope, displaying its smooth, white surface.
description_view_2: Another thin side profile, mirroring view 0, emphasizing the envelope's slimness.
description_view_3: The front of the envelope, featuring two red postage stamps and handwritten address lines.
attribute_address_markings: Handwritten address lines are visible on the front, but no specific names or addresses are legible.
attribute_presence_of_postage_stamps: Two red postage stamps are visible in the upper right corner of the front side.
